name: @prmaat/mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for PrMaat — expose your agent passport + rooms + audit proofs as tools in Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP client. v0.3.0: tools renamed prmaat_* (legacy myclaw_* aliases preserved). Env: PRMAAT_APT (legacy MYCLAW_APT still accepted).
